items.headline: Montreal will 'stick to our system' in Game 5 vs Tampa Bay
items.description:
MONTREAL -- The Montreal Canadiens lost a two-goal lead, their composure and a huge opportunity to gain the upper hand against the Tampa Bay Lightning.
They had a day off Monday to reset and regroup for Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round in Tampa, Florida, on Wednesday (7

items.headline: Max Crozier hit on Juraj Slafkovsky could be series-changer for Tampa Bay
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Max Crozier?
On a team highlighted by names such as Nikita Kucherov, Brandon Hagel, Jake Guentzel, Brayden Point and Andrei Vasilevskiy, could it be third-pair defenseman who ends up keeping the Tampa Bay Lightning’s realistic Stanley Cup aspirations alive?

items.headline: Boston 'embracing' chance for redemption in Game 5 vs Buffalo
items.description:
BOSTON -- None of the emotions from Sunday had dissipated by the time the Boston Bruins arrived at their practice facility on Monday. They were embarrassed. They were angry. They were disappointed.
"Today they came in and they were pissed," coach Marco Sturm said. "You could see it in practice.

items.headline: P.K. Subban's bond with Montreal still solid in 2026 playoff run
items.description:
MONTREAL -- Retired defenseman P.K. Subban was back in his first NHL home over the weekend, in a suite at raucous Bell Centre for Games 3 and 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning.

items.headline: Why Los Angeles Kings are eliminated from 2025-26 postseason
items.description: The Los Angeles Kings were eliminated from the Stanley Cup Playoffs with a 5-1 loss to the Colorado Avalanche in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles on Sunday. It was the first time they were swept in a best-of-7 series since the

items.headline: Nikita Zadorov fined maximum for cross-checking in Game 4 with Boston Bruins
items.description: NEW YORK -- Boston Bruins defenseman Nikita Zadorov has been fined $5,000, the maximum allowable under the Collective Bargaining Agreement, for cross-checking Buffalo Sabres defenseman Rasmus Dahlin during Game 4 of the teams’ First Round series in Boston on Sunday, April 26, the National Hockey League’s Department of Player Safety

items.headline: Arturs Silovs may get chance to save Pittsburgh again in Game 5
items.description:
PITTSBURGH -- Arturs Silovs already helped save the Pittsburgh Penguins' season once.
The rookie goalie has earned a chance to do it again against the Philadelphia Flyers for Game 5 of the Eastern Conference First Round at PPG Paints Arena on Monday (7 p.m. ET; SN-PIT, NBCSP, ESPN, SN, TVAS).

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers pushed to brink, running out of time to find another level
items.description: ANAHEIM -- The Edmonton Oilers are in a familiar position, sitting in a hole in the Stanley Cup Playoffs and needing a monumental effort to climb out.
